name: shopping_journey

observed_strengths.observation: 8 payment methods supported including Apple Pay and Shop Pay — broad payment coverage for mobile and wallet buyers
Full journey completed: PDP → add-to-cart → cart → checkout entry in 4 clicks — mechanical purchase path is clean

missing_or_weak.observation: No guest checkout option detected (friction: -0.5) — requiring account creation at checkout increases abandonment for new visitors
No trust badges at checkout — payment security signals absent at the final conversion step
Cart upsell not triggered (cart_upsell_present: false) despite 'WANT MORE?' section in cart structure — may not show recommendations for empty cart or requires product in cart to populate
No urgency signals in cart (countdown timer, free shipping threshold bar, low-stock notice absent)

purchase_path_notes: Journey nearly frictionless at 4.5/5. The single friction flag (no guest checkout) is the most impactful lever — forcing account creation before purchase is a known high-abandonment trigger for first-time buyers. Trust badges absent at checkout compounds this.
